description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration. The barrels are short and metallic, with a dark, matte finish, and are aligned horizontally. The stock is minimal, forming a curved wooden grip that extends just behind the trigger, lacking a full shoulder stock. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a smooth, continuous contour. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible metal and wood components. The shotgun's size and configuration suggest it is intended for close-quarters use, typical of a sawed-off shotgun.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short wooden grip and dark metal barrels. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring a rounded trigger guard and minimal stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, the curved wooden grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the width of the barrels, with the grip and trigger guard partially visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the barrels and grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back ends of the barrels and the top of the wooden grip, with the trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short barrels with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous contour and no finger grooves
